Traffic Portfolio Intelligence

Stop gambling on
single traffic sources.

87% of publishers depend on one channel for survival. One algorithm update, one policy change, one platform pivot — and revenue vanishes overnight. Polytraffic gives you the frameworks to build traffic portfolios that survive volatility.

Risk Assessment

Typical Publisher Traffic Allocation

Most publishers operate concentrated portfolios. The gap between current allocation and optimal diversification is where the risk lives.

Concentrated Portfolio

HIGH RISK • SINGLE-SOURCE DEPENDENT

Google Organic87%
Direct9%
Other4%

Diversified Portfolio

RESILIENT • MULTI-CHANNEL

SEO35%
Email (Owned)25%
Social15%
Referral12%
Paid8%
Direct5%
Research Areas

Explore by Domain

Channels

Deep analysis of each traffic channel: acquisition cost, scalability ceiling, platform risk, and correlation with other sources.

Economics

CPV analysis, attribution models, and ROI frameworks. Measure what each visitor actually costs and what they generate.

Resilience

Algorithm survival, platform risk scoring, correlation analysis. Build portfolios that absorb volatility instead of breaking.

Recent Analysis

Tools

DIY Attribution: Track Multi-Channel Traffic Impact Without $10k/Month Analytics Tools

Build a functional multi-touch attribution system using Google Sheets, Airtable, and Google Tag Manager. Stop paying enterprise prices for attribution data your business actually needs.

Read analysis → Channels

How to Audit Your SEO Dependency Before the Next Core Update

A step-by-step SEO dependency audit that quantifies your Google concentration risk before the next algorithm update hits. Includes HHI scoring, revenue exposure mapping, and remediation priorities.

Read analysis → Channels

Bing SEO for Publishers: Capturing the 9% Google Ignores

Bing handles 9% of global search queries and powers AI answers across Microsoft products. Learn how Bing SEO differs from Google and how publishers can capture this overlooked traffic.

Read analysis → Channels

Community-Led Traffic: Discord, Slack, and Circle Communities as Traffic Engines

Private communities on Discord, Slack, and Circle generate high-trust referral traffic with near-zero platform risk. Build community-led traffic that compounds with membership.

Read analysis → Economics

Channel Economics: Calculate the True Cost Per Visitor for SEO, Paid, Email, and Social

Stop believing CPV metrics that ignore time, tools, and opportunity costs. Learn to calculate the true cost per visitor across organic search, paid acquisition, email marketing, and social channels using a full economic model.

Read analysis → Economics

Customer Acquisition Cost by Channel: CAC Benchmarks for Organic, Paid, Social, and Referral

Compare customer acquisition costs across organic search, paid ads, social media, and referral channels with 2025-2026 benchmark data from HubSpot, ProfitWell, and SEMrush.

Read analysis →

Find: Traffic Portfolio Framework
